text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The season for summer camp has finally come
back around. And this year, once again...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! We beat everyone on the bus to camp
this year too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Having rivals is so much fun!
choice_data_list: I'm not sure anyone else is competing with us...
I'm not sure anyone else is competing with us...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If they aren't, then I'll just have to keep beating
them every year until they do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's enjoy camp to the max! First on
the agenda is suntan lotion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins another summer camp with
Maruzensky.
